requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — Uganda Import and Installation Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——乌干达进口与安装证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——烏干達進口與安裝證據

summary.en: For Uganda-facing EVSE, IEC 61851-1 is the international safety baseline for conductive EV supply equipment, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, electric shock protection, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and safety marking. IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV charging stations. UNBS PVoC import review and project owners may require standards evidence before shipment or installation, while ERA installation-permit requirements govern who may carry out electrical installation work.
summary.zh: 面向乌干达的EVSE应以IEC 61851-1作为电动汽车传导供电设备的国际安全基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、防触电、互锁、过流和过温保护以及安全标识。IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车充电站。UNBS PVoC进口审查和项目业主可能在出货或安装前要求标准证据；ERA安装许可要求则规范可实施电气安装作业的人员。
summary.zht: 面向烏干達的EVSE應以IEC 61851-1作為電動汽車傳導供電設備的國際安全基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、防觸電、互鎖、過流和過溫保護以及安全標識。IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車充電站。UNBS PVoC進口審查和項目業主可能在出貨或安裝前要求標準證據；ERA安裝許可要求則規範可實施電氣安裝作業的人員。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which follows the same broad EV conductive charging subject area but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence may help engineering review but does not replace IEC 61851 evidence for Uganda projects that specify IEC standards.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，覆盖相同的电动汽车传导充电主题，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可支持工程审查，但不能替代乌干达项目在指定IEC标准时所需的IEC 61851证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，覆蓋相同的電動汽車傳導充電主題，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可支持工程審查，但不能替代烏干達項目在指定IEC標準時所需的IEC 61851證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited safety test reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, enclosure IP evidence suitable for indoor or outdoor Uganda sites, protective-device ratings, earthing instructions, thermal operating limits, and installation manuals for ERA-permitted electricians and the receiving utility or site owner. A standalone GB/T 18487 report should be treated as a starting point, not a complete Uganda IEC safety package.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可安全测试报告、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、适合乌干达室内或室外场站的外壳IP证据、保护器件额定值、接地说明、热运行限制，以及供ERA许可电工和接收电力公司或场地方使用的安装手册。单独的GB/T 18487报告应被视为起点，而非完整的乌干达IEC安全资料包。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可安全測試報告、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、適合烏干達室內或室外場站的外殼IP證據、保護器件額定值、接地說明、熱運行限制，以及供ERA許可電工和接收電力公司或場地方使用的安裝手冊。單獨的GB/T 18487報告應被視為起點，而非完整的烏干達IEC安全資料包。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / project-specific — IEC 61851 evidence is expected where IEC EVSE safety is specified by importer, UNBS PVoC route, utility, buyer, tender, or site owner; installation work is subject to ERA permit rules
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not a direct IEC 61851 substitute without clause-level review and testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Uganda-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851-1 evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, suitable enclosure and protection evidence, and installation instructions aligned with ERA and utility expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向乌干达的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851-1证据、直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、适当的外壳和保护证据，以及符合ERA和电力公司预期的安装说明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向烏干達的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851-1證據、直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、適當的外殼和保護證據，以及符合ERA和電力公司預期的安裝說明。
